projects.name: Startup Funding Detection & Outreach Automation
projects.summary: Built an end-to-end prospecting workflow to detect recently funded startups, log structured leads, support decision-maker identification, and generate cold-email drafts with minimal manual intervention.
highlights: Defined qualification logic, lead documentation structure, and outreach flow
Achieved approximately 15% response rate and 5% lead rate with manual review limited to final draft editing
Currently extending the workflow into a centralized assistant system with OpenClaw, Telegram bot routing, and Linear issue creation for hot leads

projects.name: Gamified Job Application Tracker
projects.summary: Built a mobile job application tracking app to centralize opportunity data, track progression, and support accountability through an engaging gaming loop.
highlights: Developed the app through Expo with AI-assisted iteration
Produced an Android APK build and deployed it to personal phone for daily use
Designed the tool as a lightweight personal operations system replacing fragmented notes and spreadsheet-based tracking

projects.name: Google Workspace Email Triage & Drafting Automation
projects.summary: Designed a personal workflow to detect notification-worthy inbound emails and automatically prepare follow-up drafts for high-value opportunities.
highlights: Defined prioritization rules and draft-generation logic

experience.title: AI Engineer (Intern)
responsibilities: Designed and implemented an end-to-end meeting-intelligence pipeline in Python combining speech-to-text, speaker diarization, transcript segmentation, action extraction, and retrieval-oriented transcript structuring
Owned the preprocessing stack end to end: audio cleaning, chunking, segmentation, embedding-based refinement, and output formatting for downstream search and review workflows
Improved multi-speaker clarity by tuning diarization thresholds and refining segmentation and embedding choices, increasing transcript usability for real conversations
Delivered navigable meeting outputs with chaptered transcripts and chat-style retrieval, reducing review time for early users by an estimated 40–60%

experience.title: Machine Learning Engineer (Master Thesis)
responsibilities: Benchmarked modern computer vision segmentation models for multimodal obstacle detection, including DeepLab, SegFormer, and YOLO-based variants
Evaluated trade-offs across inference speed, accuracy, and hardware cost to support architecture decisions for constrained deployment scenarios
Synthesized metrics, model behavior, and product constraints into rigorous weekly reports for startup founders, linking technical findings to real deployment choices

experience.title: Tableau Analyst (Freelance)
responsibilities: Built and debugged Tableau dashboards for clients in marketing and operations, integrating data sources, translating raw data into KPI frameworks, reporting logic, and decision-ready views
Optimized calculations, data-source structure, and dashboard performance to improve refresh speed, usability, and reporting reliability
Worked directly with clients to refine business questions, validate metrics, and iterate on analytical deliverables with practical decision-making in mind
